name: Quanta
description: This weapon was designed to assist with the excavation of mineral deposits from large asteroids, but has been adapted for military purposes.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: This weapon was designed to assist with the excavation of mineral deposits from large asteroids, but has been adapted for military purposes.

components.name: Circuits
components.description:
Various electronic components.

Location: Venus, Ceres, and the Kuva Fortress

components.name: Fieldron
components.description:
ClanTech weaponized containment field to contain superheated substances.

Location: Clan Research (Energy Lab in the Dojo) and Corpus Invasion Rewards

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Deimos: Arcana: Prime Vault 29.5.9
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed some animation issues where the Quanta Vandal’s arms wouldn’t fully open after reload. This also fixed related motion blur on reload. 
Fixed script error with the Quanta Vandal.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Vauban’s Flechette Orb being destroyed if thrown into a Mutalist Quanta orb.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Hotfix 27.2.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Quanta 
Quanta Vandal

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Quanta and Quanta Vandal alt fire cube explosion sound no longer playing.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.4.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Mutalist Quanta Alt Fire orbs not stacking.
Fixed a script error when Reviving with the Mutalist Quanta equipped.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Update 24.3.0 - Nightwave
patchlogs.changes: Changed the Mutalist Quanta Alt Fire damage type from Electricity to Toxin and slightly increased the Explosion Range from 6m to 8m.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.3.0
patchlogs.changes: Penta grenades will now bounce off the Blunt. It has a similar behavior as hitting a Grineer. Note that projectiles like Quanta cubes do not bounce off Grineer. Thus, cubes will not bounce off the Blunt.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Update 20.6.0 + 20.6.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Removed unintended 25 Impact damage AOE when Mutalist Quanta orb expires (it still does 100 Electrical damage). The Impact damage never scaled with Mods and would only have hit if the target was inside the orb.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.2.3
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the Rift Stasis weight of the Mutalist Quanta stackable projectile.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Hotfix 20.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Quanta’s Alt fire producing a split second beam when used in Limbo’s Stasis.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mutalist Quanta projectiles not scaling when stacked.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.changes:
Javlok, Buzlok, Ferrox, Harpak, Hind, Mutalist Quanta, Penthera, Paracyst, Penta, Quanta (Vandal), Stradavar, Tenora, Zarr
The Mutalist Quanta is getting more of a mechanic change rather than just stats.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.5.4
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Nidus’ Larva getting destroyed by high damage Quanta alt fire.

patchlogs.name: Update 19: The War Within
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Penta and Quanta Ranger Eximus’ merging into one another when viewed in the Codex.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.11.0 & 18.11.1
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed the Mutalist Quanta store icon being too small.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.8.1
patchlogs.changes: •    The Quanta Vandal and Prova Vandal are now tradable!

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes: The Quanta, Mutalist Quanta, and Volt have all been given a PBR update.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.7
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Quanta cubes being explodable twice for Hosts.
Fixed the Infested Quanta’s audio FX not playing properly.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.3
patchlogs.changes: Fixed the Vandal Aufeis Quanta Skin not properly applying to the Quanta’s cartridge as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/593391-qanta-vandal-aufeis-again-bugged/

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.2.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Quanta Aufeis Skin skin not being applicable to the Quanta or Quanta Vandal.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Quanta and Quanta Vandal projectiles not exploding when shot by a Client.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Quanta’s projectile explosions causing excessive particle creations.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.4.3 + Credit Reimbursement #2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Quanta Vandal not appearing in the player Codex.

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Archwing
patchlogs.changes:
QUANTA RANGER (Corpus Jet Pack Spaceman with Quanta): Crewman equipped with a jetpack.
Reduced the explosion effects of Quanta's cubes in an attempt to improve performance.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.9.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue where the Mutalist Quanta could be completely reloaded at the start of the animation, the animation must now complete before all ammo is reloaded.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.1.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Split Chamber and the Quanta resulting in a face explosion when fired, projectiles from the same ‘shot’ will no longer collide with each other.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.1.2 + 14.1.2.1
patchlogs.changes: Fixed an issue with the Quanta’s Alt Fire projectile not blowing up correctly for clients.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.1.0: Quanta & Dendra
patchlogs.fixes: New Quanta Weapon: Originally designed for mineral extraction on large asteroids, this tool has recently been adapted for deadly military purposes!

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.11
patchlogs.fixes: Damage multipliers for the Amprex, Brakk, Drakgoon, Karak, Hind, Marelok, Mutalist Quanta, Tysis, AkLato, Burston Prime, Lato, Braton, Tetra, Tigris all normalized (no more arbitrary multipliers).

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.5
patchlogs.changes: Performance Improvements for Mirage + Hall of Mirrors and Angstrum, Ogris, Penta, and Mutalist Quanta, and Stug.

patchlogs.name: Update 14: The Mad Cephalon
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issue with Mutalist Quanta dealing friendly fire damage.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.9.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Clients being unable to deal damage when shooting through Mutalist Quanta orb.

patchlogs.name: 13.9.0 + 13.9.0.1: The Venka
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with the alt fire on the Mutalist Quanta being duplicated by Nyx's Absorb ability.

patchlogs.name: Update 13.8.0: Breeding Grounds
patchlogs.additions: Tenno Reinforcement: the Mutalist Quanta! Find it today in the Market or Infested Research lab!
